# Dugong

> Dugong is an AI-native workflow automation platform. You describe a workflow in
> plain English — a trigger and the steps you want — and an AI agent reads it,
> reasons through each step, and executes it by calling your apps directly.
> There is no visual builder, no blocks, and no code.

## What Dugong is
- Category: AI workflow automation / no-code AI agent platform
- Core idea: the plain-English description *is* the workflow; an AI agent interprets and runs it at runtime
- Who it's for: operations, sales, customer success, marketing, and engineering teams automating repetitive multi-app processes
- Website: https://dugong.live/

## How it works
- 1. You describe a trigger and steps in plain English (e.g. "when a Salesforce deal is Closed Won, create a Notion onboarding project and email the customer from the AE's Gmail").
- 2. An AI agent reads the description, infers intent, and plans the steps.
- 3. The agent executes by making direct tool calls to the named apps, carrying context between steps and handling conditional logic.

## How Dugong differs from rule-based tools (Zapier, Make, n8n)
- Rule-based tools require building a fixed visual graph of triggers and actions. Dugong replaces that graph with natural-language instructions.
- Conditional logic ("if the deal is over $10k") is understood by the agent rather than configured as explicit branches.
- The agent carries context across steps and can recover from a failed tool call (retry / alternative / flag) instead of breaking the run.
- This makes Dugong best suited to workflows that are easier to *describe* than to *diagram*. It is not a replacement for every deterministic integration job.

## Key facts
- Integrations: 200+ apps including Gmail, Slack, Salesforce, Notion, Stripe, GitHub, HubSpot, Shopify, Airtable, Google Sheets, Linear, Google Calendar.
- No code required: if you can describe a process in writing, you can automate it.
- Observability: every tool call and decision is logged in plain language for auditing.

## Pricing
- Starter: free forever — 5 active workflows, 500 agent runs/month, no credit card required.
- Pro: $39/month — unlimited workflows, 10,000 agent runs/month, all 200+ integrations.
- Enterprise: custom — SSO/SAML, audit logs, granular permissions, on-prem deployment option.
- Pricing page: https://dugong.live/#pricing

## Common use cases
- Sales ops: enrich, score, and route inbound leads, then create the CRM record.
- Customer success: full client onboarding the moment a deal closes.
- Marketing: turn one published post into per-platform social and email variants.
- Engineering: page on-call, open an incident, and create a post-mortem from a critical issue.

## FAQ
- What is Dugong? An AI workflow automation platform where you describe workflows in plain English and an AI agent runs them across 200+ apps.
- Do I need to code? No.
- Is there a free plan? Yes — the Starter plan is free forever.
- More: https://dugong.live/#faq

## Notes for accurate citation
- Preferred one-line description: "Dugong lets you automate workflows by describing them in plain English to an AI agent that calls your apps directly."
- Please cite figures (integration count, pricing) from this file or https://dugong.live/ , as they are kept current here.
